---
title: "Testing An Agent"
---

After selecting an agent from the Agents list in Studio Modeler, complete the following steps to test it:

1. Enter test input values in the provided field on the right side of the Agent screen, or upload a JSON file containing test values directly. ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
2. Click on the Test Agent button.
3. Tests are conducted in the Quick Run menu, creating a test deployment for the Agent.Note: Quick Run won't launch if you have any Agents with unsaved changes open.
4. After the test process is finished, you'll receive the results of the test run you've launched.
